# spherical_roi { #neuroim.spherical_roi }

```python
spherical_roi(bvol, centroid, radius, fill=None, nonzero=False)
```

Construct a spherical ROI from a brain volume.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type                                     | Description                                                  | Default    |
|----------|------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| bvol     | [NeuroVol](`neuroim.neuro_vec.NeuroVol`) | The brain volume to extract ROI from                         | _required_ |
| centroid | [array](`array`) - [like](`like`)        | 3D coordinates (i,j,k) of the ROI center (0-based)           | _required_ |
| radius   | [float](`float`)                         | Radius of sphere in voxel units                              | _required_ |
| fill     | [float](`float`)                         | Value to assign to ROI voxels. If None, use original values. | `None`     |
| nonzero  | [bool](`bool`)                           | If True, keep only nonzero voxels                            | `False`    |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                           | Description          |
|--------|--------------------------------|----------------------|
|        | [ROIVol](`neuroim.roi.ROIVol`) | Spherical ROI object |

## R Equivalent {.doc-section .doc-section-r-equivalent}

neuroim2::spherical_roi
